phrases.cultural_note: Hamamönü'nde el sanatları atölyeleri dağınık bir yerleşime sahip olabilir.

likely_response.translation_en: In the side streets, toward the bazaar.

responses.english: In the side streets, toward the bazaar.

phrases.intent_en: Do I remove shoes in the mosque?
phrases.cultural_note: It is a standard and mandatory practice to remove shoes before entering a mosque in Turkey.

likely_response.local: Evet, camiye girmeden önce ayakkabılarınızı çıkarın.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, remove your shoes before entering the mosque.

responses.english: Yes, remove your shoes before entering the mosque.
responses.french: Evet, camiye girmeden önce ayakkabılarınızı çıkarın.

phrases.intent_en: Is parking fee charged outside area?
phrases.cultural_note: Bölge dışı otopark kuralları değişiklik gösterebilir.

phrases.intent_en: Where is Hacı Bayram Mosque entrance?

likely_response.translation_en: In the square ahead, on the left.

responses.english: In the square ahead, on the left.

phrases.intent_en: Do I remove shoes in the mosque?
phrases.cultural_note: Türkiye'deki tüm camilerde içeri girmeden önce ayakkabı çıkarmak zorunludur.

likely_response.local: Evet, camiye girmeden önce ayakkabılarınızı çıkarın.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, remove your shoes before entering the mosque.

responses.english: Yes, remove your shoes before entering the mosque.
responses.french: Evet, camiye girmeden önce ayakkabılarınızı çıkarın.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I see Ankara Castle views?
phrases.cultural_note: Hamamönü Square is a stable landmark from which the Ankara Castle is visible, making it a reliable reference point.

likely_response.local: Danışmaya sorun, Hamamönü Meydanı'ndan kaleyi görebilirsiniz.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask for assistance; you can see the castle from Hamamönü Square.

responses.english: Ask for assistance; you can see the castle from Hamamönü Square.
responses.french: Danışmaya sorun, Hamamönü Meydanı'ndan kaleyi görebilirsiniz.

phrases.intent_en: Is parking fee charged outside area?
phrases.text_local: Otopark ücreti dışarıda da var mı?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking fee policies can change; directing the traveler to the park bekçi (guard) ensures they get the correct information.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I see Ankara Castle views?
phrases.cultural_note: Ankara Kalesi manzarası için en iyi noktalar bölgeye hakim tepelerdedir.

likely_response.translation_en: The view is good from the mosque courtyard.

responses.english: The view is good from the mosque courtyard.
